summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Aashwashan mental health website new features. All 13 backend tests passed. All frontend features tested and working correctly including session duration pricing, coupon code functionality, payment endpoints (MOCKED), community page backend integration, and UI elements.

backend_api_tests.details: 13/13 tests passed - Payment endpoints (create-order, verify-payment), Community posts (POST/GET), Appointments with session pricing

ignoring_signs_section.details: Structured layout with 4 numbered signs, 'Choose a Therapist' button present with data-testid

booking_modal_session_pricing.details: 30 min (₹999), 45 min (₹1400), 60 min (₹1600) session buttons displayed correctly on both Homepage and TeamPage

coupon_code_functionality.details: Coupon input field present, 'Aashwashan20' applies 20% discount correctly, success message shown

price_summary.details: Shows session duration, original price (with strikethrough when coupon applied), and discounted total

roi_text.details: 'Spending ₹1000 on mental health can give you a 4x return of ₹4000' text visible at bottom

footer_logo.details: Footer shows company logo image (PNG from customer-assets.emergentagent.com), not text 'A' in circle

why_aashwashan_section.details: Shows all 4 items: Weekly Schedule Planning, Find Your Triggers, Execution Plan, Emotional Healing

community_page_backend.details: POST /api/community-posts works, posts appear in feed immediately, GET /api/community-posts returns posts

payment_endpoints.details: /api/create-order returns mock order ID, /api/verify-payment returns Jitsi Meet link

team_page_booking.details: Session pricing section displayed, booking modal has same session duration selector and coupon functionality

seed_data_creation: Test appointments, community posts, and payment orders created during API testing with TEST_ prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features tested and working. Session duration pricing (30/45/60 min with ₹999/₹1400/₹1600) implemented on both Homepage and TeamPage booking modals. Coupon code 'Aashwashan20' applies 20% discount. Community page connected to backend. Payment endpoints are MOCKED (Razorpay not configured - returns mock orders and Jitsi Meet links).

mocked_apis_list: Razorpay payments - returns mock orders without real API keys
Email notifications (logs only, no actual SMTP)
UPI payment (manual confirmation, no actual payment processing)
